underlying_goal: Make VAD settings configurable via LaunchDarkly to reduce turn detection latency in real-time interpretation, enabling shorter turns and faster transcription feedback
friction_detail: Vitest CI failed because the useLaunchDarkly mock was missing getFeatureFlag, requiring a follow-up fix.
brief_summary: User wanted configurable VAD sensitivity via LaunchDarkly for faster interpretation turns; feature was designed, implemented, and shipped as a PR with one CI fix needed.
